pageContext.name: Haunted Mansion Goblet
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco proudly present the Haunted Mansion Goblet Collectible Drinkware!  This goblet stands at 7.09' tall and is made out of stone resin, stainless steel, and crystal. The goblet has the Haunted Mansion logo from one of Disney's most famous and favorite rides, fit for any ghost-loving Disney collectibles fan. Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
